name: The Forgotten Battlefield
description: The grass here is unnaturally long, hiding the rusted remains of spears and shields. This was the site of a great battle long ago.

discovery.message: The road passes through a wide, silent plain littered with the rusted metal of a past age.

the-field.text: The wind whistles through the rusted relics of war. You can see a partially collapsed war monument in the distance.

choices.label: [Charisma 12] Offer a moment of silence for the fallen.
Scavenge the field for anything useful.

leave.text: You leave the battlefield to the silence of the dead.

search-remains.text: You use your knowledge of military history to identify where the high-ranking officers might have fallen.
search-remains.success_text: You find a half-buried helm with the markings of the Royal Vanguard. Beneath it lies a fine blade.
search-remains.failure_text: You find only rusted scrap and bone fragments.

commander-loot.text: The longsword is still in remarkably good condition.

honor-fallen.text: A brief sense of peace settles over the field. You feel more connected to the history of these lands.

scavenge-field.text: As you pick through the debris, the ground begins to churn. A restless spirit rises from the earth!

scavenge-success.text: With the spirits laid to rest, you find a few loose coins and a dented shield.
